violations.text: Sliced tomatoes and shredded lettuce were observed held at 46-47 degrees Fahrenheit in the grill prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were evaluated and were voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

Working containers of semolina flour are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Containers were labeled during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

Various grab and go food items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Food labeling guidance was provided during the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the deli 3-door low boy, the pizza 3-door low boy, pizza prep unit, and grab & go 1-door reach-in cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

The Sushi Bar does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. Duct tape observed on edges of round table in sushi area, COB: 12/13/2024 2. Deli case coating observed peeling, COB: 09/01/2025 3. Grill drawers observed in poor repair. Equipment out of service prior to inspection, COB: 11/27/2024 4. Prep Unit observed at ranging ambient temperatures of 28-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was taken out of service to hold TCS/PHF foods during time of inspection, COB: 11/27/2024 New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

The Sushi Bar does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

Beef and vegetable soup in the self service area are lacking labels. Food in the self service area shall be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, and major allergen. -Staff provided the label during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
